rules.long_entry: bullish regime (EMA20>EMA50>EMA200) AND price bounces up off EMA20 or EMA50 AND MACD histogram rising
rules.short_entry: bearish regime (EMA20<EMA50<EMA200) AND price bounces down off EMA20 or EMA50 AND MACD histogram falling
rules.long_exit: TP: +7.00% | SL: -5.00% (intrabar, SL wins on tie)
rules.short_exit: TP: -7.00% | SL: +5.00% (intrabar, SL wins on tie)
